description: You are an incident responder investigating a compromised server. Analyze the Telnet session captured in /home/ga/Documents/captures/telnet-cooked.pcap and produce an incident report at /home/ga/Documents/captures/telnet_incident_report.txt. The report must include the following labeled items: the username used to log in, the password used to log in, the operating system or system banner displayed at connection, all commands typed by the user after login (one per line), and the total number of Telnet data packets in the capture. Ensure each item is clearly labeled and each command is listed on its own line.
